subject: [PATCH v5 00/18] userfaultfd: working set tracking for VM guest memory

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Identified a double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() where the folio refcount drops to zero prematurely. Suggested adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio() to maintain the reference.

reviews.author: Mike Rapoport (Microsoft)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch series, noting that it is a good start but requires further review and testing.

reviews.author: SeongJae Park
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the performance impact of the new RWP mechanism and suggested further testing.

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch series introduces working set tracking for VM guest memory, enabling userfaultfd to provide read-write protection (RWP) for virtual machine guests. The patches add new flags and functions to support RWP, including a VMA flag, change_protection() primitives, and modifications to the huge page handling code.
